buttons.primary: bg-[#4fc3f7]/10 border border-[#4fc3f7] text-[#4fc3f7] rounded-none hover:bg-[#4fc3f7]/30 hover:text-white hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(79,195,247,0.5)] transition-all duration-200 uppercase tracking-widest font-bold
buttons.warning: bg-[#ff6f00]/10 border border-[#ff6f00] text-[#ff6f00] rounded-none hover:bg-[#ff6f00]/30 hover:text-white hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,111,0,0.5)] transition-all duration-200 uppercase tracking-widest font-bold
buttons.secondary: bg-[#37474f]/30 border border-[#37474f] text-white rounded-none hover:bg-[#37474f]/50 hover:text-white transition-all duration-200 uppercase tracking-widest

inputs.background: bg-[#0a0e1a] border border-[#37474f] text-white rounded-none focus:border-[#4fc3f7] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#4fc3f7] focus:shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(79,195,247,0.3)] transition-all outline-none

layout.spacing: Dense 'Control Room' mode. Tight gaps (gap-4). Every pixel utilized.
layout.corners: Always sharp. Enforce rounded-none everywhere without exception.

visual_enhancers.background_texture: Use an SVG noise filter overlaid on the #0a0e1a background with mix-blend-mode: overlay and low opacity (5-10%) to create a static noise/ice crystal feel. Add subtle radial gradients using #4fc3f7/5 in the corners to simulate screen glow.
visual_enhancers.typewriter_effect: Essential for 'INTELLIGENCE REPORT' AI responses. Implement using framer-motion or a simple React interval hook to reveal text character by character.
visual_enhancers.scanning_line: Optional: A 1px high horizontal line of #4fc3f7 that travels down the screen slowly to simulate a scanning HUD.
visual_enhancers.glitch_effect: Use CSS glitch on text hover for buttons.

icons.style: strokeWidth={1.5}, color={#4fc3f7} for primary icons, color={#ff6f00} for warnings. Examples: Snowflake (❄️), Swords (⚔️), MountainSnow (🏔️)

components_mapping.Card: Use generic div with surface.panels styles instead of default Shadcn Card to enforce sharp corners and glowing borders.
components_mapping.Button: Customize Shadcn Button heavily: rounded-none, transparent backgrounds, glowing borders. Always set text color explicitly on hover.
components_mapping.Input: Customize Shadcn Input: rounded-none, #0a0e1a background, #37474f border.
components_mapping.Select: Customize Shadcn Select to match the input style.
components_mapping.Slider: Customize Shadcn Slider with a sharp rectangular thumb and an glowing #4fc3f7 track.

testing_attributes.requirement: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to rounded-none on all UI elements.
The background must be a solid #0a0e1a with an overlaid SVG static noise effect to simulate a frozen military HUD.
Ensure all text rendering over dark backgrounds has high contrast, utilizing the text_primary and text_secondary colors.
Implement the typewriter effect for the AI Intelligence Report area.
The Mission Counter must turn to the warning color (#ff6f00) when low (e.g. 1/3 or 0/3).
The 'ENTER WAR ROOM' CTA must be massive and command attention.
Use Rajdhani for all headings, labels, and buttons. Use Chivo for long-form AI report text.
Mobile-first constraint: The left panel on the main screen must be collapsible into a slide-over menu or accordion on mobile.
Ensure the UI uses English text only as requested.

background.description: Optional: Dark blue background with circular design. If used, set opacity to 5-10% and mix-blend-mode: overlay. Preference is raw CSS SVG noise.
